TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ye-low-ni-mi-s.pow-si "ŤÄ∂ÁĺÖŚįľÁĪ≥śĖĮ¬∑ś≥ĘŚłĆ == ŤÄ∂ÁĺÖŚįľÁĪ≥śĖĮ¬∑ś≥ĘŚłĆ(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Jheronimus Bosch,Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ěÁôľťü≥: (je'…ĺoňźnim Źs 'b…Ēs),1452 ¬∑ś≥ĘŚłĆ(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Hi√ęronymus Bosch,Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě: (…¶ijeňź'roňźnim Źz 'b…Ēs) )śąĖŤÄ∂ŚÄę¬∑ś≥ĘŚłĆ(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Jeroen Bosch),ŚéüŚźćŤÄ∂ÁĺÖŚįľÁĪ≥śĖĮ¬∑ŤĆÉťėŅŤāĮ(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Jheronimus van Aken,Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ěÁôľťü≥: (je'…ĺoňźnim Źs v…Ďn 'aňźk…ô )), . Ye-low-ni-mi-s.pow-si "kamu nu Hw-lan, Jheronimus Bosch, Helan a nipangiha " (je'…ĺoňźnim Źs 'b…Ēs), i 1452 a mihcaan katukuh i 1516 a mih can 8 a bulad" singangan aca tu ci Si-ya-low-ni-mi-s. Helan a kamu Hi√ęronymus Bosch,Helan a kamu:(…¶ijeňź'roňźnim Źz 'b…Ēs) "tingil anucaay" anucaay Ye-lun.pow-si " "Helan a kamu Jeroen Bosch", uyaanay a ngangan Ye-low-n-mi-s.han-a-ken "He-lan a kamu "Jheronimus van Aken", He-lan a pangiha, (je'…ĺoňźnim Źs v…Ďn 'aňźk…ô ) ,He-lan 15 katukuh 16 lasubu a mihcaan a nikulitan kapahay nu mikulitay. yadah ku nitudengay ilul atu caay katineng tu balucu' nu tademaw. ci Po-si a satang, pangkiw u tademaw pangkiw u aadupan tuwaca u kikay ku waway a patahkal tu katal nu tademaw. malawlaw ku nikulitan niza, talakaw ku nipabaluhay misanga', u pizateng, yadah ku mahicahicaay mahizaay u bacu. nu uzuma caay kahapinang katinengan. cu Po-si u i 20 lasubu a mihcaan u palingatuay tu tatenga'ay a nizatengan. nikauzipan ¬∑ŤĆÉťėŅŤāĮ(Jheronimus van Aken), Bosch(Ťć∑Ťė≠śĖá,ťü≥ŤŅĎŤčĪśĖáBoss), El Bosco. zuma a uyaan a ngangan ci Ye-low-ni-mi-s.ban-a-ken "Jheronimus van Aken" u imi "A-hen tayniay a tademaw". zumaay a nikulitan ciza a ngangan Bosch "u He-lan a cudad, ngiha macapi tu nu A-mi-lika Boss" sa, miala tu kalecuhan niza a kakitizaan S-hay-al-tu-heng-po-si. i S-pang-ya a cudadan pangangan han ci El Bosco. ci Po-si-lecahan i mikulitay a lumaan, u wama wina niza u He-lan atu Te-kow a tademawan. hatu I Hay-al-tu-tin-po-si amauzip ciniza, uyni I 15 lasubu a mihcaan itawya u Pu-la-pang nu "ayzaay timulan He-lan" cacay u makengkengay a tukay. 1463 a mihcaan hawsa, pakala tu 13 a mihcaan hakay namaazih niza ku tizaay nu pahaceng u satebuc. cay aka tenes hawsa u singanganay tu ciniza tu mutesekay nu mikulita, tuwaca namaala ku patudud nu tauay a kanatal. 1488 a mihcaan micumud ciniza tu maliya caekakaan a sakaput, uyza u malekecay tu singku a putuput, 40 ku tademaw ci S-hay-al-to-heng-po-si u sitatungusay tu tademaw, atu Ow-co kasa kakitizaay tu 7000 kakatuud nu sakaput a tademaw. u waywayťĘ®ś†ľ uyni a nikulitan calekay ku pabaway a kulit, atu laylay ni Ba-lan-te-s, a wayway, misakapah tu lamedeng nu hekal nu tademaw caay kakapah ku nalimaan masazuma caay kalecad. " . katukuhi tu kabalakian, Pow-su a wayway masumaday tu, misumad u mitudung tu tabakiay, micapi tu sasanaulan nu tademaw tu sapaazih. tungusay a nisangaan u "tay-ce-kwan a ciwlu" "Christ Crowned with Thorns". ci Pow-si caay ka i pikulatan amisulit nu demiad tizasaca izunma a nikulitan pangangnan "zuma sacaay ku nu uzip anipangangan", u kamu amin, imahini maahapinang tu namakay lima ni kulitan ni Po-si, 25 tu dada' a kakulitan. ". Si-pang-ya kow-wang ci Bey-li tusa lasubu a mihcaan i Pow-si mapatay zikuz mahaminay tu masinga' ku nikulitan niza, namahiza imahini Si-pang-ya Ma-te-li a Pu-la a piazihan tu nikulitan masinga' tu ku sayadahay a nikulitan ni Pow-si, pasu "sakapahay ni kauzip nu tademaw". sazikuzay tu amihcaan Ba-lan-te-s mutesekay nu mikulitay balaki Pi-te.Pu-le-ce-al malilid ni Pow-si, zuma a nikulitan a waway masasengi tu ni Pow-say, mahiniay 1562 a mihcaan tu "makademec tu nikapatay".
S.PHON: == j…ô-r~…ĺow-ni-mi-s.pow-si "******** == ********(***:*ńß…ôronimus bos ¶ńß,*****: (j…ô Ē~ °…ĺo*nim*s Ē~ °b*s),**** ***(***:ńßi*ronjmus bos ¶ńß,***: (*ij…ô* Ē~ °ro*nim*z Ē~ °b*s) )******(***:*…ôro…ôn bos ¶ńß),***********(***:*ńß…ôronimus *an ak…ôn,*****: (j…ô Ē~ °…ĺo*nim*s **n Ē~ °a*k…ô )), . j…ô-r~…ĺow-ni-mi-s.pow-si "kamu nu ńßw-r~…ĺan, *ńß…ôronimus bos ¶ńß, ńß…ôr~…ĺan a nipaŇčińßa " (j…ô Ē~ °…ĺo*nim*s Ē~ °b*s), i **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad" siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu ¶i si-ja-r~…ĺow-ni-mi-s. ńß…ôr~…ĺan a kamu ńßi*ronjmus bos ¶ńß,ńß…ôr~…ĺan a kamu:(*ij…ô* Ē~ °ro*nim*z Ē~ °b*s) "tiŇčir~…ĺ anu ¶aaj" anu ¶aaj j…ô-r~…ĺun.pow-si " "ńß…ôr~…ĺan a kamu *…ôro…ôn bos ¶ńß", ujaanaj a ŇčaŇčan j…ô-r~…ĺow-n-mi-s.ńßan-a-k…ôn "ńß…ô-r~…ĺan a kamu "*ńß…ôronimus *an ak…ôn", ńß…ô-r~…ĺan a paŇčińßa, (j…ô Ē~ °…ĺo*nim*s **n Ē~ °a*k…ô ) ,ńß…ô-r~…ĺan ** katukuńß ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan a nikur~…ĺitan kapańßaj nu mikur~…ĺitaj. jadańß ku nitud…ôŇčaj ir~…ĺur~…ĺ atu ¶aaj katin…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw. ¶i po-si a sataŇč, paŇčkiw u tad…ômaw paŇčkiw u aadupan tuwa ¶a u kikaj ku wawaj a patańßkar~…ĺ tu katar~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺawr~…ĺaw ku nikur~…ĺitan niza, tar~…ĺakaw ku nipabar~…ĺuńßaj misaŇča Ē~ °, u pizat…ôŇč, jadańß ku mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj mańßizaaj u ba ¶u. nu uzuma ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč katin…ôŇčan. ¶u po-si u i ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan u par~…ĺiŇčatuaj tu tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a nizat…ôŇčan. nikauzipan ****(*ńß…ôronimus *an ak…ôn), bos ¶ńß(***,****boss), …ôr~…ĺ bos ¶o. zuma a ujaan a ŇčaŇčan ¶i j…ô-r~…ĺow-ni-mi-s.ban-a-k…ôn "*ńß…ôronimus *an ak…ôn" u imi "a-ńß…ôn tajniaj a tad…ômaw". zumaaj a nikur~…ĺitan ¶iza a ŇčaŇčan bos ¶ńß "u ńß…ô-r~…ĺan a ¶udad, Ňčińßa ma ¶api tu nu a-mi-r~…ĺika boss" sa, miar~…ĺa tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan niza a kakitizaan s-ńßaj-ar~…ĺ-tu-ńß…ôŇč-po-si. i s-paŇč-ja a ¶udadan paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i …ôr~…ĺ bos ¶o. ¶i po-si-r~…ĺ…ô ¶ańßan i mikur~…ĺitaj a r~…ĺumaan, u wama wina niza u ńß…ô-r~…ĺan atu t…ô-kow a tad…ômawan. ńßatu i ńßaj-ar~…ĺ-tu-tin-po-si amauzip ¶iniza, ujni i ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan itawja u pu-r~…ĺa-paŇč nu "ajzaaj timur~…ĺan ńß…ô-r~…ĺan" ¶a ¶aj u mak…ôŇčk…ôŇčaj a tukaj. **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, pakar~…ĺa tu ** a mińß ¶aan ńßakaj namaazińß niza ku tizaaj nu pańßa ¶…ôŇč u sat…ôbu ¶. ¶aj aka t…ôn…ôs ńßawsa u siŇčaŇčanaj tu ¶iniza tu mut…ôs…ôkaj nu mikur~…ĺita, tuwa ¶a namaar~…ĺa ku patudud nu tauaj a kanatar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud ¶iniza tu mar~…ĺija ¶a…ôkakaan a sakaput, ujza u mar~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶aj tu siŇčku a putuput, ** ku tad…ômaw ¶i s-ńßaj-ar~…ĺ-to-ńß…ôŇč-po-si u sitatuŇčusaj tu tad…ômaw, atu ow- ¶o kasa kakitizaaj tu **** kakatuud nu sakaput a tad…ômaw. u wajwaj** ujni a nikur~…ĺitan ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkaj ku pabawaj a kur~…ĺit, atu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ni ba-r~…ĺan-t…ô-s, a wajwaj, misakapańß tu r~…ĺam…ôd…ôŇč nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj kakapańß ku nar~…ĺimaan masazuma ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. " . katukuńßi tu kabar~…ĺakian, pow-su a wajwaj masumadaj tu, misumad u mituduŇč tu tabakiaj, mi ¶api tu sasanaur~…ĺan nu tad…ômaw tu sapaazińß. tuŇčusaj a nisaŇčaan u "taj- ¶…ô-kwan a ¶iwr~…ĺu" " ¶ńßrist ¶rown…ôd witńß tńßorns". ¶i pow-si ¶aaj ka i pikur~…ĺatan amisur~…ĺit nu d…ômiad tizasa ¶a izunma a nikur~…ĺitan paŇčaŇčnan "zuma sa ¶aaj ku nu uzip anipaŇčaŇčan", u kamu amin, imańßini maańßapinaŇč tu namakaj r~…ĺima ni kur~…ĺitan ni po-si, ** tu dada Ē~ ° a kakur~…ĺitan. ". si-paŇč-ja kow-waŇč ¶i b…ô-r~…ĺi tusa r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan i pow-si mapataj zikuz mańßaminaj tu masiŇča Ē~ ° ku nikur~…ĺitan niza, namańßiza imańßini si-paŇč-ja ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi a pu-r~…ĺa a piazińßan tu nikur~…ĺitan masiŇča Ē~ ° tu ku sajadańßaj a nikur~…ĺitan ni pow-si, pasu "sakapańßaj ni kauzip nu tad…ômaw". sazikuzaj tu amińß ¶aan ba-r~…ĺan-t…ô-s mut…ôs…ôkaj nu mikur~…ĺitaj bar~…ĺaki pi-t…ô.pu-r~…ĺ…ô- ¶…ô-ar~…ĺ mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ni pow-si, zuma a nikur~…ĺitan a wawaj masas…ôŇči tu ni pow-saj, mańßiniaj **** a mińß ¶aan tu "makad…ôm…ô ¶ tu nikapataj".
S.FORM: == Ye-low-ni-mi-s.pow-si "ŤÄ∂ÁĺÖŚįľÁĪ≥śĖĮ¬∑ś≥ĘŚłĆ == ŤÄ∂ÁĺÖŚįľÁĪ≥śĖĮ¬∑ś≥ĘŚłĆ(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Jheronimus Bosch,Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ěÁôľťü≥: (je'…ĺoňźnim Źs 'b…Ēs),1452 ¬∑ś≥ĘŚłĆ(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Hi√ęronymus Bosch,Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě: (…¶ijeňź'roňźnim Źz 'b…Ēs) )śąĖŤÄ∂ŚÄę¬∑ś≥ĘŚłĆ(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Jeroen Bosch),ŚéüŚźćŤÄ∂ÁĺÖŚįľÁĪ≥śĖĮ¬∑ŤĆÉťėŅŤāĮ(Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ě:Jheronimus van Aken,Ťć∑Ťė≠Ť™ěÁôľťü≥: (je'…ĺoňźnim Źs v…Ďn 'aňźk…ô )), . Ye-low-ni-mi-s.pow-si "kamu nu Hw-lan, Jheronimus Bosch, Helan a nipangiha " (je'…ĺoňźnim Źs 'b…Ēs), i 1452 a mihcaan katukuh i 1516 a mih can 8 a bulad" singangan aca tu ci Si-ya-low-ni-mi-s. Helan a kamu Hi√ęronymus Bosch,Helan a kamu:(…¶ijeňź'roňźnim Źz 'b…Ēs) "tingil anucaay" anucaay Ye-lun.pow-si " "Helan a kamu Jeroen Bosch", uyaanay a ngangan Ye-low-n-mi-s.han-a-ken "He-lan a kamu "Jheronimus van Aken", He-lan a pangiha, (je'…ĺoňźnim Źs v…Ďn 'aňźk…ô ) ,He-lan 15 katukuh 16 lasubu a mihcaan a nikulitan kapahay nu mikulitay. yadah ku nitudengay ilul atu caay katineng tu balucu' nu tademaw. ci Po-si a satang, pangkiw u tademaw pangkiw u aadupan tuwaca u kikay ku waway a patahkal tu katal nu tademaw. malawlaw ku nikulitan niza, talakaw ku nipabaluhay misanga', u pizateng, yadah ku mahicahicaay mahizaay u bacu. nu uzuma caay kahapinang katinengan. cu Po-si u i 20 lasubu a mihcaan u palingatuay tu tatenga'ay a nizatengan. nikauzipan ¬∑ŤĆÉťėŅŤāĮ(Jheronimus van Aken), Bosch(Ťć∑Ťė≠śĖá,ťü≥ŤŅĎŤčĪśĖáBoss), El Bosco. zuma a uyaan a ngangan ci Ye-low-ni-mi-s.ban-a-ken "Jheronimus van Aken" u imi "A-hen tayniay a tademaw". zumaay a nikulitan ciza a ngangan Bosch "u He-lan a cudad, ngiha macapi tu nu A-mi-lika Boss" sa, miala tu kalecuhan niza a kakitizaan S-hay-al-tu-heng-po-si. i S-pang-ya a cudadan pangangan han ci El Bosco. ci Po-si-lecahan i mikulitay a lumaan, u wama wina niza u He-lan atu Te-kow a tademawan. hatu I Hay-al-tu-tin-po-si amauzip ciniza, uyni I 15 lasubu a mihcaan itawya u Pu-la-pang nu "ayzaay timulan He-lan" cacay u makengkengay a tukay. 1463 a mihcaan hawsa, pakala tu 13 a mihcaan hakay namaazih niza ku tizaay nu pahaceng u satebuc. cay aka tenes hawsa u singanganay tu ciniza tu mutesekay nu mikulita, tuwaca namaala ku patudud nu tauay a kanatal. 1488 a mihcaan micumud ciniza tu maliya caekakaan a sakaput, uyza u malekecay tu singku a putuput, 40 ku tademaw ci S-hay-al-to-heng-po-si u sitatungusay tu tademaw, atu Ow-co kasa kakitizaay tu 7000 kakatuud nu sakaput a tademaw. u waywayťĘ®ś†ľ uyni a nikulitan calekay ku pabaway a kulit, atu laylay ni Ba-lan-te-s, a wayway, misakapah tu lamedeng nu hekal nu tademaw caay kakapah ku nalimaan masazuma caay kalecad. " . katukuhi tu kabalakian, Pow-su a wayway masumaday tu, misumad u mitudung tu tabakiay, micapi tu sasanaulan nu tademaw tu sapaazih. tungusay a nisangaan u "tay-ce-kwan a ciwlu" "Christ Crowned with Thorns". ci Pow-si caay ka i pikulatan amisulit nu demiad tizasaca izunma a nikulitan pangangnan "zuma sacaay ku nu uzip anipangangan", u kamu amin, imahini maahapinang tu namakay lima ni kulitan ni Po-si, 25 tu dada' a kakulitan. ". Si-pang-ya kow-wang ci Bey-li tusa lasubu a mihcaan i Pow-si mapatay zikuz mahaminay tu masinga' ku nikulitan niza, namahiza imahini Si-pang-ya Ma-te-li a Pu-la a piazihan tu nikulitan masinga' tu ku sayadahay a nikulitan ni Pow-si, pasu "sakapahay ni kauzip nu tademaw". sazikuzay tu amihcaan Ba-lan-te-s mutesekay nu mikulitay balaki Pi-te.Pu-le-ce-al malilid ni Pow-si, zuma a nikulitan a waway masasengi tu ni Pow-say, mahiniay 1562 a mihcaan tu "makademec tu nikapatay".

par~…ĺiŇčatuaj tu tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a nizat…ôŇčan. nikauzipan ****(*ńß…ôronimus *an ak…ôn), bos ¶ńß(***,****boss), …ôr~…ĺ bos ¶o. zuma a ujaan a ŇčaŇčan ¶i j…ô-r~…ĺow-ni-mi-s.ban-a-k…ôn "*ńß…ôronimus *an ak…ôn" u imi "a-ńß…ôn tajniaj a tad…ômaw". zumaaj a nikur~…ĺitan ¶iza a ŇčaŇčan bos ¶ńß "u ńß…ô-r~…ĺan a ¶udad, Ňčińßa ma ¶api tu nu a-mi-r~…ĺika boss" sa, miar~…ĺa tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan niza a kakitizaan s-ńßaj-ar~…ĺ-tu-ńß…ôŇč-po-si. i s-paŇč-ja a ¶udadan paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶i …ôr~…ĺ bos ¶o. ¶i po-si-r~…ĺ…ô ¶ańßan i mikur~…ĺitaj a r~…ĺumaan, u wama wina niza u ńß…ô-r~…ĺan atu t…ô-kow a tad…ômawan. ńßatu i ńßaj-ar~…ĺ-tu-tin-po-si amauzip ¶iniza, ujni i ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan itawja u pu-r~…ĺa-paŇč nu "ajzaaj timur~…ĺan ńß…ô-r~…ĺan" ¶a ¶aj u mak…ôŇčk…ôŇčaj a tukaj. **** a mińß ¶aan patudud nu tauaj a kanatar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud ¶iniza tu mar~…ĺija ¶a…ôkakaan a sakaput, ujza u mar~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶aj tu siŇčku a putuput, ** ku tad…ômaw ¶i s-ńßaj-ar~…ĺ-to-ńß…ôŇč-po-si u sitatuŇčusaj tu tad…ômaw, atu ow- ¶o kasa kakitizaaj tu **** kakatuud nu sakaput a tad…ômaw. u wajwaj** ujni a nikur~…ĺitan ¶ar~…ĺ…ôkaj ku pabawaj a kur~…ĺit, atu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ni ba-r~…ĺan-t…ô-s, a wajwaj, misakapańß tu r~…ĺam…ôd…ôŇč nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw ¶aaj kakapańß ku nar~…ĺimaan masazuma ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. " . katukuńßi tu kabar~…ĺakian, pow-su a wajwaj masumadaj tu, misumad u mituduŇč tu tabakiaj, mi ¶api tu sasanaur~…ĺan nu tad…ômaw tu sapaazińß. tuŇčusaj a nisaŇčaan u "taj- ¶…ô-kwan a ¶iwr~…ĺu" " ¶ńßrist ¶rown…ôd witńß tńßorns". ¶i pow-si ¶aaj ka i pikur~…ĺatan amisur~…ĺit nu d…ômiad tizasa ¶a izunma a nikur~…ĺitan paŇčaŇčnan "zuma sa ¶aaj ku nu uzip anipaŇčaŇčan", u kamu amin, imańßini maańßapinaŇč tu namakaj r~…ĺima ni kur~…ĺitan ni po-si, ** tu dada Ē~ ° a kakur~…ĺitan. ". si-paŇč-ja kow-waŇč ¶i b…ô-r~…ĺi tusa r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan i pow-si mapataj zikuz mańßaminaj tu masiŇča Ē~ ° ku nikur~…ĺitan niza, namańßiza imańßini si-paŇč-ja ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi a pu-r~…ĺa a piazińßan tu nikur~…ĺitan masiŇča Ē~ ° tu ku sajadańßaj a nikur~…ĺitan ni pow-si, pasu "sakapańßaj ni kauzip nu tad…ômaw". sazikuzaj tu amińß ¶aan ba-r~…ĺan-t…ô-s mut…ôs…ôkaj nu mikur~…ĺitaj bar~…ĺaki pi-t…ô.pu-r~…ĺ…ô- ¶…ô-ar~…ĺ mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ni pow-si, zuma a nikur~…ĺitan a wawaj masas…ôŇči tu ni pow-saj, mańßiniaj **** a mińß ¶aan tu "makad…ôm…ô ¶ tu nikapataj".
